ANONYMOUS.name: adjust_ui
ANONYMOUS.description: Adjust the UI appearance for accessibility, comfort, or user preference. Use when users say things like 'make text bigger', 'I'm old', 'too bright', 'I'm color blind', 'compact mode', or 'hard to read'. You can apply a named preset OR set individual properties. Presets: 'elderly' (large text, relaxed spacing), 'compact' (dense info), 'high-contrast' (dark + large), 'color-blind-deuteranopia', 'color-blind-protanopia', 'color-blind-tritanopia', 'default' (reset all).

ANONYMOUS.name: calculator
ANONYMOUS.description: Performs arithmetic. Mandatory for every math calculation.

ANONYMOUS.name: get_corpus_summary
ANONYMOUS.description: Get an overview of all 11 books and their chapters.

ANONYMOUS.name: get_current_page
ANONYMOUS.description: Return authoritative information about the page the user is currently viewing, including visible page content when available.

ANONYMOUS.name: inspect_runtime_context
ANONYMOUS.description: Inspect the current role-scoped runtime context for truthful meta answers about available tools, the current page, and prompt provenance when requested.

ANONYMOUS.name: inspect_theme
ANONYMOUS.description: Inspect the supported theme profiles and bounded UI control axes. This is read-only and does not mutate theme or accessibility state.

ANONYMOUS.name: list_available_pages
ANONYMOUS.description: List all pages the current user can access based on their role.

ANONYMOUS.name: navigate_to_page
ANONYMOUS.description: Navigate the user to a validated page. Dispatches the destination to the client UI and returns route metadata.

ANONYMOUS.name: search_corpus
ANONYMOUS.description: Search across all 11 books (93 chapters) in the Second Renaissance Knowledge System.

AUTHENTICATED.name: adjust_ui
AUTHENTICATED.description: Adjust the UI appearance for accessibility, comfort, or user preference. Use when users say things like 'make text bigger', 'I'm old', 'too bright', 'I'm color blind', 'compact mode', or 'hard to read'. You can apply a named preset OR set individual properties. Presets: 'elderly' (large text, relaxed spacing), 'compact' (dense info), 'high-contrast' (dark + large), 'color-blind-deuteranopia', 'color-blind-protanopia', 'color-blind-tritanopia', 'default' (reset all).

AUTHENTICATED.name: calculator
AUTHENTICATED.description: Performs arithmetic. Mandatory for every math calculation.

AUTHENTICATED.name: compose_media
AUTHENTICATED.description: Compose, trim, and combine visual and audio assets into a new MP4 video. Produces a unified artifact. You must provide governed asset handles.

AUTHENTICATED.name: generate_audio
AUTHENTICATED.description: Generate in-chat audio player.

AUTHENTICATED.name: generate_chart
AUTHENTICATED.description: Generate a visual Mermaid.js chart. Prefer the structured spec for common chart families like flowcharts, pie charts, quadrants, xy charts, and mindmaps. Use raw Mermaid code only for advanced layouts. Do not send prose or summaries in the code field.

AUTHENTICATED.name: generate_graph
AUTHENTICATED.description: Generate a quantitative graph or data table for time-series questions, comparisons across segments or categories, distributions, outlier analysis, and explicit requests for a graph, trend, plot, values over time, or custom visualization. Prefer the structured spec with graphType plus x/y/color/size encodings and validated transforms. Use data.source only for approved server-owned datasets such as analytics_funnel, lead_queue, routing_review, conversation_activity, affiliate_my_* referral datasets, and the admin_affiliate_* referral datasets.

AUTHENTICATED.name: get_checklist
AUTHENTICATED.description: Get chapter checklists.

AUTHENTICATED.name: get_corpus_summary
AUTHENTICATED.description: Get an overview of all 11 books and their chapters.

AUTHENTICATED.name: get_current_page
AUTHENTICATED.description: Return authoritative information about the page the user is currently viewing, including visible page content when available.

AUTHENTICATED.name: get_my_affiliate_summary
AUTHENTICATED.description: Return the current signed-in affiliate account's referral summary metrics, credit status, and concise guidance. Use when the user asks how their referral link is performing.

AUTHENTICATED.name: get_my_job_status
AUTHENTICATED.description: Get the current status of one of the signed-in user's jobs by job ID. Use when the user asks what a specific job is doing.

AUTHENTICATED.name: get_my_profile
AUTHENTICATED.description: Get the current user's profile details, including name, email, credential, and referral settings. Use when the user asks to see their account info or referral details.

AUTHENTICATED.name: get_my_referral_qr
AUTHENTICATED.description: Get the current user's referral code, referral landing URL, and QR code image URL when affiliate access is enabled.

AUTHENTICATED.name: get_section
AUTHENTICATED.description: Retrieve structured full content, canonical metadata, and related sections for a specific section.

AUTHENTICATED.name: inspect_runtime_context
AUTHENTICATED.description: Inspect the current role-scoped runtime context for truthful meta answers about available tools, the current page, and prompt provenance when requested.

AUTHENTICATED.name: inspect_theme
AUTHENTICATED.description: Inspect the supported theme profiles and bounded UI control axes. This is read-only and does not mutate theme or accessibility state.

AUTHENTICATED.name: list_available_pages
AUTHENTICATED.description: List all pages the current user can access based on their role.

AUTHENTICATED.name: list_my_jobs
AUTHENTICATED.description: List jobs for the signed-in user's account. Use active_only=true or omit it for current work; use active_only=false only when the user explicitly asks for all jobs or a list.

AUTHENTICATED.name: list_my_referral_activity
AUTHENTICATED.description: Return recent referral milestones for the current signed-in affiliate account, including introductions, registrations, qualified opportunities, and credit-state changes.

AUTHENTICATED.name: list_practitioners
AUTHENTICATED.description: List key practitioners referenced in the series.

AUTHENTICATED.name: navigate_to_page
AUTHENTICATED.description: Navigate the user to a validated page. Dispatches the destination to the client UI and returns route metadata.

AUTHENTICATED.name: search_corpus
AUTHENTICATED.description: Search across all 11 books (93 chapters) in the Second Renaissance Knowledge System.

AUTHENTICATED.name: search_my_conversations
AUTHENTICATED.description: Search your own conversation history to recall past discussions.

AUTHENTICATED.name: set_preference
AUTHENTICATED.description: Set a user preference that persists across sessions and devices. Use for non-UI preferences like tone, response style, business context, or preferred name. When a user says 'remember that I prefer concise answers' or 'call me Keith', use this tool.

AUTHENTICATED.name: set_theme
AUTHENTICATED.description: Change site aesthetic era.

AUTHENTICATED.name: update_my_profile
AUTHENTICATED.description: Update the current user's profile fields. Use for name, email, or credential changes requested by the user. This writes to the same profile backend used by the profile page.

ADMIN.name: adjust_ui
ADMIN.description: Adjust the UI appearance for accessibility, comfort, or user preference. Use when users say things like 'make text bigger', 'I'm old', 'too bright', 'I'm color blind', 'compact mode', or 'hard to read'. You can apply a named preset OR set individual properties. Presets: 'elderly' (large text, relaxed spacing), 'compact' (dense info), 'high-contrast' (dark + large), 'color-blind-deuteranopia', 'color-blind-protanopia', 'color-blind-tritanopia', 'default' (reset all).

ADMIN.name: admin_prioritize_leads
ADMIN.description: Rank submitted leads that need founder attention and return the next revenue action. Admin only.

ADMIN.name: admin_prioritize_offer
ADMIN.description: Choose the single offer or message that should be pushed first based on current funnel, anonymous-demand, and lead-queue signals. Admin only.

ADMIN.name: admin_search
ADMIN.description: Search across all admin entities (users, leads, consultations, deals, training, conversations, jobs, prompts, journal posts). Returns matching results with links to detail pages. Admin only.

ADMIN.name: admin_triage_routing_risk
ADMIN.description: Identify the conversations most likely to hurt customer outcome because of routing uncertainty or overdue follow-up. Admin only.

ADMIN.name: admin_web_search
ADMIN.description: Search the live web using OpenAI and return a sourced answer with citations. Use allowed_domains to target specific sites (e.g. en.wikipedia.org for Wikipedia searches). Admin only.

ADMIN.name: approve_journal_post
ADMIN.description: Approve a journal post for publication, or return a published post to approved status through the workflow policy boundary.

ADMIN.name: calculator
ADMIN.description: Performs arithmetic. Mandatory for every math calculation.

ADMIN.name: compose_blog_article
ADMIN.description: Compose a structured markdown blog article from a brief, audience, and objective. Admin only.

ADMIN.name: compose_media
ADMIN.description: Compose, trim, and combine visual and audio assets into a new MP4 video. Produces a unified artifact. You must provide governed asset handles.

ADMIN.name: draft_content
ADMIN.description: Draft a journal article as structured markdown. Use markdown headings, lists, links, quotes, tables, or fenced code blocks as appropriate. Do not repeat the title inside the content body. The article is saved as a draft that must be explicitly published by an admin.

ADMIN.name: generate_audio
ADMIN.description: Generate in-chat audio player.

ADMIN.name: generate_blog_image
ADMIN.description: Generate a blog hero image, persist it as a blog asset, and optionally attach it to a post as the canonical hero image. Admin only.

ADMIN.name: generate_blog_image_prompt
ADMIN.description: Design a blog hero-image prompt, alt text, size, and quality from a final article. Admin only.

ADMIN.name: generate_chart
ADMIN.description: Generate a visual Mermaid.js chart. Prefer the structured spec for common chart families like flowcharts, pie charts, quadrants, xy charts, and mindmaps. Use raw Mermaid code only for advanced layouts. Do not send prose or summaries in the code field.

ADMIN.name: generate_graph
ADMIN.description: Generate a quantitative graph or data table for time-series questions, comparisons across segments or categories, distributions, outlier analysis, and explicit requests for a graph, trend, plot, values over time, or custom visualization. Prefer the structured spec with graphType plus x/y/color/size encodings and validated transforms. Use data.source only for approved server-owned datasets such as analytics_funnel, lead_queue, routing_review, conversation_activity, affiliate_my_* referral datasets, and the admin_affiliate_* referral datasets.

ADMIN.name: get_admin_affiliate_summary
ADMIN.description: Return the global affiliate program totals, leaderboard highlights, exception pressure, and funnel health. Use when an admin asks which affiliates are driving results or how much review backlog exists.

ADMIN.name: get_checklist
ADMIN.description: Get chapter checklists.

ADMIN.name: get_corpus_summary
ADMIN.description: Get an overview of all 11 books and their chapters.

ADMIN.name: get_current_page
ADMIN.description: Return authoritative information about the page the user is currently viewing, including visible page content when available.

ADMIN.name: get_deferred_job_status
ADMIN.description: Look up the current status of a deferred job by job ID. Summarize the result in plain language after reading it. Admin only.

ADMIN.name: get_journal_post
ADMIN.description: Load one journal post with editorial metadata, workflow status, and admin support routes. Accepts either the post ID or the article slug.

ADMIN.name: get_journal_workflow_summary
ADMIN.description: Summarize blocked drafts, in-review items, publish-ready articles, and active journal jobs for the current admin.

ADMIN.name: get_my_affiliate_summary
ADMIN.description: Return the current signed-in affiliate account's referral summary metrics, credit status, and concise guidance. Use when the user asks how their referral link is performing.

ADMIN.name: get_my_job_status
ADMIN.description: Get the current status of one of the signed-in user's jobs by job ID. Use when the user asks what a specific job is doing.

ADMIN.name: get_my_profile
ADMIN.description: Get the current user's profile details, including name, email, credential, and referral settings. Use when the user asks to see their account info or referral details.

ADMIN.name: get_my_referral_qr
ADMIN.description: Get the current user's referral code, referral landing URL, and QR code image URL when affiliate access is enabled.

ADMIN.name: get_section
ADMIN.description: Retrieve structured full content, canonical metadata, and related sections for a specific section.

ADMIN.name: inspect_runtime_context
ADMIN.description: Inspect the current role-scoped runtime context for truthful meta answers about available tools, the current page, and prompt provenance when requested.

ADMIN.name: inspect_theme
ADMIN.description: Inspect the supported theme profiles and bounded UI control axes. This is read-only and does not mutate theme or accessibility state.

ADMIN.name: list_admin_referral_exceptions
ADMIN.description: Return unresolved referral attribution records and credit-review backlog items for admins only. Use when the user asks what needs manual review or which referral records are still broken.

ADMIN.name: list_available_pages
ADMIN.description: List all pages the current user can access based on their role.

ADMIN.name: list_deferred_jobs
ADMIN.description: List deferred jobs for the current conversation. Return active jobs by default; include terminal jobs only when the admin explicitly asks for a list or all jobs. Admin only.

ADMIN.name: list_journal_posts
ADMIN.description: List journal posts for the admin workspace, with support for search, workflow status, and section filters.

ADMIN.name: list_journal_revisions
ADMIN.description: List saved editorial revisions for a journal post.

ADMIN.name: list_my_jobs
ADMIN.description: List jobs for the signed-in user's account. Use active_only=true or omit it for current work; use active_only=false only when the user explicitly asks for all jobs or a list.

ADMIN.name: list_my_referral_activity
ADMIN.description: Return recent referral milestones for the current signed-in affiliate account, including introductions, registrations, qualified opportunities, and credit-state changes.

ADMIN.name: list_practitioners
ADMIN.description: List key practitioners referenced in the series.

ADMIN.name: navigate_to_page
ADMIN.description: Navigate the user to a validated page. Dispatches the destination to the client UI and returns route metadata.

ADMIN.name: prepare_journal_post_for_publish
ADMIN.description: Check whether a journal post is ready to publish, optionally run editorial QA, and summarize blockers or readiness.

ADMIN.name: produce_blog_article
ADMIN.description: Compose, QA, resolve, design the hero image prompt, generate the hero image, and persist a linked blog draft with artifacts. Admin only.

ADMIN.name: publish_content
ADMIN.description: Publish a draft journal article, making it publicly visible in the journal. Accepts either the post ID or the article slug.

ADMIN.name: publish_journal_post
ADMIN.description: Publish an approved journal post, preserving revision history and aligning the selected hero image visibility. Accepts either the post ID or the article slug.

ADMIN.name: qa_blog_article
ADMIN.description: Run editorial QA against a structured markdown blog article and return normalized findings. Admin only.

ADMIN.name: resolve_blog_article_qa
ADMIN.description: Revise a structured markdown blog article to resolve a normalized QA report. Admin only.

ADMIN.name: restore_journal_revision
ADMIN.description: Restore a prior journal revision through the canonical revision-safe editorial mutation boundary.

ADMIN.name: search_corpus
ADMIN.description: Search across all 11 books (93 chapters) in the Second Renaissance Knowledge System.

ADMIN.name: search_my_conversations
ADMIN.description: Search your own conversation history to recall past discussions.

ADMIN.name: select_journal_hero_image
ADMIN.description: Select the canonical hero image for a journal post by delegating to the existing hero-image service.

ADMIN.name: set_preference
ADMIN.description: Set a user preference that persists across sessions and devices. Use for non-UI preferences like tone, response style, business context, or preferred name. When a user says 'remember that I prefer concise answers' or 'call me Keith', use this tool.

ADMIN.name: set_theme
ADMIN.description: Change site aesthetic era.

ADMIN.name: submit_journal_review
ADMIN.description: Move a journal post into editorial review.

ADMIN.name: update_journal_draft
ADMIN.description: Update the draft body for a journal post through the canonical editorial mutation boundary.

ADMIN.name: update_journal_metadata
ADMIN.description: Update journal title, slug, description, standfirst, or section through the canonical editorial mutation boundary.

ADMIN.name: update_my_profile
ADMIN.description: Update the current user's profile fields. Use for name, email, or credential changes requested by the user. This writes to the same profile backend used by the profile page.

checks.label: Internal ToolRegistry remains the primary runtime path
checks.expected: tool-composition-root builds the internal ToolRegistry without importing the MCP SDK.

checks.label: Recorded operations MCP inventory matches shared export schemas
Runtime inventory MCP processes match canonical process metadata
Active operations docs match the governed runtime story
checks.expected: Process and system docs describe MCP as a thin export boundary and the internal ToolRegistry as the primary runtime.

checks.label: Release evidence promotes Sprint 25 elite-ops summaries

measurements.label: Retrieval preparation
notes: Measures query normalization and synonym expansion only, not full retrieval, to avoid local embedder variance.

measurements.label: Prompt assembly
notes: Measures the governed ADMIN prompt assembly path with the live tool manifest.

measurements.label: First tool execution
notes: Measures the first governed calculator execution through the composition root.

measurements.label: Representative MCP stdio round trip
notes: Measures calculator MCP stdio startup, call, and teardown as the representative export path.

warnings: Budgets are intentionally generous and rely on representative local samples so the gate catches order-of-magnitude regressions rather than incidental variance.

probes.label: Provider fallback path
probes.expectedSignal: Model-not-found failures classify predictably and both provider callers emit model_fallback events.

probes.label: Missing key / env misconfiguration path
probes.diagnostic: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY/API__ANTHROPIC_API_KEY must be set to a non-empty value.
probes.expectedSignal: Missing Anthropic configuration fails fast with an explicit non-empty-value error.

probes.label: DB busy / lock contention path
probes.expectedSignal: SQLite connections advertise a 5000ms busy_timeout before surfacing SQLITE_BUSY.

probes.expectedSignal: A broken MCP entrypoint fails fast with an explicit missing-module diagnostic.

warnings: Budgets are intentionally generous and rely on representative local samples so the gate catches order-of-magnitude regressions rather than incidental variance.

notes: Current-page truthfulness is exercised through live-runner fixtures with authoritative page snapshots.
Duplicate navigation avoidance is gated by role-manifest tests and live runner coverage that rejects legacy navigate usage.
Manual QA intake must map back to either a deterministic integrity scenario, a live runner scenario, or a focused regression suite before closeout.

warnings: Budgets are intentionally generous and rely on representative local samples so the gate catches order-of-magnitude regressions rather than incidental variance.

steps.label: integrity eval suites
steps.command: npm exec vitest run tests/evals/elite-ops-evidence.test.ts tests/evals/runtime-integrity-checks.test.ts tests/evals/eval-scenarios.test.ts tests/evals/eval-runner.test.ts tests/evals/eval-live-runner.test.ts tests/evals/eval-release-evidence.test.ts tests/evals/runtime-integrity-evidence.test.ts src/lib/corpus-vocabulary.test.ts src/lib/readme-drift.test.ts src/core/use-cases/tools/search-corpus.tool.test.ts src/core/tool-registry/ToolResultFormatter.test.ts src/core/use-cases/tools/inspect-runtime-context.tool.test.ts src/lib/chat/tool-composition-root.test.ts src/lib/chat/current-page-context.test.ts src/adapters/ChatPresenter.test.ts src/frameworks/ui/RichContentRenderer.test.tsx src/components/AudioPlayer.test.tsx
